headline: Assessing Marriott (MAR) Valuation After Strong Long Term Shareholder Returns
summary: Marriott International (MAR) is back on investor radar after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at US$331.93. That comes alongside reported annual revenue of US$6.98b and net income of US$2.60b. See our latest analysis for Marriott International. Recent trading has been choppy, with a small 1-day share price return decline of 0.46% set against a 7-day share price return of 4.53%. At the same time, the 1-year total shareholder return of 56.15% and 5-year total shareholder return...

headline: Is Marriott’s Lefay Luxury Wellness Venture Reshaping the Brand Mix Narrative for Marriott (MAR)?
summary: In March 2026, Marriott International and the Leali family entered a joint venture to bring Italy-based luxury wellness brand Lefay into the Marriott portfolio, making it the company’s first brand devoted exclusively to luxury wellness resorts under long-term management agreements. This move adds a wellness-focused eco-resort platform with existing and pipeline properties in high-end European nature destinations, broadening Marriott’s reach into health- and longevity-centered travel...

headline: Asian travelers seek respite in other options as Middle East travel plans stay grounded
summary: Ticket prices across airlines in Asia increase in the midst of Iran War tensions, Asian travelers look elsewhere to relax
